input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Upstream OGNL test configuration for JDK 17+ uses module-opening JVM args for deeper reflective/internal tests, but simple documented OGNL usage works on JDK 25 without extra setup.
The reproduced javaTest failure for 3.3.5 appears to be a test/library behavior mismatch in ObjectPropertyAccessorTest, not missing setup.
SecurityManager-related OGNL tests are brittle on modern JDKs because SecurityManager APIs are deprecated/removed progressively.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL 3.3.5 is a plain in-process expression language library; its only runtime dependency is transitive Javassist, and normal POJO expression parse/get/set coverage is reachable without extra Maven dependencies, Docker services, or required environment/system properties.
